import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

def get_observation(state):
    H, W = state.grid.shape[:2]
    H_f = jnp.float32(H)
    W_f = jnp.float32(W)

    DIRECTIONS = jnp.array([(-1, 0), (0, 1), (1, 0), (0, -1)], dtype=jnp.int32)

    agent_y = state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_x = state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    norm_ay = agent_y / (H_f - 1)
    norm_ax = agent_x / (W_f - 1)
    dir_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(state.agent.direction, 4)

    tile_ids = state.grid[:, :, 0]
    tile_colors = state.grid[:, :, 1]

    ys = jnp.arange(H)
    xs = jnp.arange(W)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')
    yy_f = yy.astype(jnp.float32)
    xx_f = xx.astype(jnp.float32)

    # Pocket state
    pocket_empty = (state.agent.pocket[0] == 0).astype(jnp.float32)
    holding_green_ball = ((state.agent.pocket[0] == 3) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == 2)).astype(jnp.float32)
    holding_blue_pyramid = ((state.agent.pocket[0] == 5) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == 3)).astype(jnp.float32)
    pocket_tile_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(state.agent.pocket[0], 13)
    pocket_color_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(state.agent.pocket[1], 12)

    # Blue pyramid (tile=5, color=3)
    blue_pyr_mask = (tile_ids == 5) & (tile_colors == 3)
    blue_pyr_count = jnp.sum(blue_pyr_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    blue_pyr_y = jnp.sum(yy_f * blue_pyr_mask) / jnp.maximum(blue_pyr_count, 1.0)
    blue_pyr_x = jnp.sum(xx_f * blue_pyr_mask) / jnp.maximum(blue_pyr_count, 1.0)
    blue_pyr_exists = jnp.clip(blue_pyr_count, 0.0, 1.0)
    rel_blue_pyr_y = (blue_pyr_y - agent_y) / (H_f - 1)
    rel_blue_pyr_x = (blue_pyr_x - agent_x) / (W_f - 1)
    dist_blue_pyr = (jnp.abs(blue_pyr_y - agent_y) + jnp.abs(blue_pyr_x - agent_x)) / (H_f + W_f - 2)

    # Yellow hex (tile=11, color=5)
    yel_hex_mask = (tile_ids == 11) & (tile_colors == 5)
    yel_hex_count = jnp.sum(yel_hex_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    yel_hex_y = jnp.sum(yy_f * yel_hex_mask) / jnp.maximum(yel_hex_count, 1.0)
    yel_hex_x = jnp.sum(xx_f * yel_hex_mask) / jnp.maximum(yel_hex_count, 1.0)
    yel_hex_exists = jnp.clip(yel_hex_count, 0.0, 1.0)
    rel_yel_hex_y = (yel_hex_y - agent_y) / (H_f - 1)
    rel_yel_hex_x = (yel_hex_x - agent_x) / (W_f - 1)
    dist_yel_hex = (jnp.abs(yel_hex_y - agent_y) + jnp.abs(yel_hex_x - agent_x)) / (H_f + W_f - 2)

    # Cells adjacent to yellow hex (the valid placement spots)
    # A cell is adjacent if manhattan distance == 1
    adj_to_hex_mask = (
        (jnp.abs(yy_f - yel_hex_y) + jnp.abs(xx_f - yel_hex_x)) == 1.0
    )
    # Floor cells adjacent to hex (valid placement)
    floor_adj_hex_mask = adj_to_hex_mask & (tile_ids == 1)
    floor_adj_count = jnp.sum(floor_adj_hex_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    floor_adj_y = jnp.sum(yy_f * floor_adj_hex_mask) / jnp.maximum(floor_adj_count, 1.0)
    floor_adj_x = jnp.sum(xx_f * floor_adj_hex_mask) / jnp.maximum(floor_adj_count, 1.0)
    rel_floor_adj_y = (floor_adj_y - agent_y) / (H_f - 1)
    rel_floor_adj_x = (floor_adj_x - agent_x) / (W_f - 1)
    dist_floor_adj = (jnp.abs(floor_adj_y - agent_y) + jnp.abs(floor_adj_x - agent_x)) / (H_f + W_f - 2)

    # Front tile info
    dy_f = DIRECTIONS[state.agent.direction][0]
    dx_f = DIRECTIONS[state.agent.direction][1]
    front_y = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.int32) + dy_f, 0, H - 1)
    front_x = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.int32) + dx_f, 0, W - 1)
    front_tile_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(tile_ids[front_y, front_x], 13)
    front_color_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(tile_colors[front_y, front_x], 12)
    front_is_blue_pyr = ((tile_ids[front_y, front_x] == 5) & (tile_colors[front_y, front_x] == 3)).astype(jnp.float32)
    # Is front tile exactly adjacent to hex (distance == 1)?
    front_dist_to_hex = jnp.abs(front_y.astype(jnp.float32) - yel_hex_y) + jnp.abs(front_x.astype(jnp.float32) - yel_hex_x)
    front_adj_hex = (front_dist_to_hex == 1.0).astype(jnp.float32)
    front_is_floor = (tile_ids[front_y, front_x] == 1).astype(jnp.float32)
    front_is_door = ((tile_ids[front_y, front_x] == 8) | (tile_ids[front_y, front_x] == 9)).astype(jnp.float32)
    # Can place: holding green ball, front is floor, front is adjacent to hex
    front_floor_adj_hex = front_is_floor * front_adj_hex
    can_place_now = holding_green_ball * front_floor_adj_hex

    # Agent adjacency
    agent_to_hex_dist = jnp.abs(agent_y - yel_hex_y) + jnp.abs(agent_x - yel_hex_x)
    agent_adj_hex = (agent_to_hex_dist <= 2.0).astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_near_pyr = (dist_blue_pyr * (H_f + W_f - 2) <= 3.0).astype(jnp.float32)

    # Doors
    closed_door_mask = (tile_ids == 9)
    locked_door_mask = (tile_ids == 8)
    open_door_mask = (tile_ids == 10)
    n_closed = jnp.sum(closed_door_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    n_locked = jnp.sum(locked_door_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    n_open = jnp.sum(open_door_mask).astype(jnp.float32)

    all_blockable = closed_door_mask | locked_door_mask
    n_blockable = jnp.sum(all_blockable).astype(jnp.float32)
    bd_y = jnp.sum(yy_f * all_blockable) / jnp.maximum(n_blockable, 1.0)
    bd_x = jnp.sum(xx_f * all_blockable) / jnp.maximum(n_blockable, 1.0)
    rel_bd_y = (bd_y - agent_y) / (H_f - 1)
    rel_bd_x = (bd_x - agent_x) / (W_f - 1)
    dist_bd = (jnp.abs(bd_y - agent_y) + jnp.abs(bd_x - agent_x)) / (H_f + W_f - 2)

    # Task phase
    phase_pickup = (blue_pyr_exists * pocket_empty)
    phase_place = holding_green_ball
    step_norm = state.step_num.astype(jnp.float32) / 400.0

    # Full grid normalized
    full_tiles = tile_ids.astype(jnp.float32).flatten() / 12.0   # 169
    full_colors = tile_colors.astype(jnp.float32).flatten() / 11.0  # 169

    # Distance map from agent position (normalized manhattan distances)
    dist_from_agent = (jnp.abs(yy_f - agent_y) + jnp.abs(xx_f - agent_x)) / (H_f + W_f - 2)
    dist_from_agent_flat = dist_from_agent.flatten()  # 169

    # Structured features
    structured = jnp.concatenate([
        # Agent (6)
        jnp.array([norm_ay, norm_ax]),
        dir_oh,

        # Pocket (25 + 3)
        pocket_tile_oh,   # 13
        pocket_color_oh,  # 12
        jnp.array([pocket_empty, holding_green_ball, holding_blue_pyramid]),

        # Blue pyramid (7)
        jnp.array([blue_pyr_y / (H_f-1), blue_pyr_x / (W_f-1),
                   rel_blue_pyr_y, rel_blue_pyr_x,
                   dist_blue_pyr, blue_pyr_exists, agent_near_pyr]),

        # Yellow hex (6)
        jnp.array([yel_hex_y / (H_f-1), yel_hex_x / (W_f-1),
                   rel_yel_hex_y, rel_yel_hex_x,
                   dist_yel_hex, yel_hex_exists]),

        # Placement target (floor adjacent to hex) (5)
        jnp.array([floor_adj_y / (H_f-1), floor_adj_x / (W_f-1),
                   rel_floor_adj_y, rel_floor_adj_x, dist_floor_adj]),

        # Front tile (25 + 5)
        front_tile_oh,   # 13
        front_color_oh,  # 12
        jnp.array([front_is_blue_pyr, front_adj_hex, front_is_floor,
                   front_is_door, front_floor_adj_hex]),

        # Task flags (7)
        jnp.array([agent_adj_hex, phase_pickup, phase_place,
                   can_place_now, n_closed/4.0, n_open/4.0, step_norm]),

        # Doors (4)
        jnp.array([rel_bd_y, rel_bd_x, dist_bd, n_blockable/4.0]),
    ])
    # structured: 6 + 28 + 3 + 7 + 6 + 5 + 30 + 7 + 4 = 96

    # Total: 96 + 169 + 169 = 434 (under 512)
    obs = jnp.concatenate([structured, full_tiles, full_colors])

    return obs.astype(jnp.float32)
